description: Configure Wireshark with custom coloring rules to highlight threats in the capture file '~/Documents/captures/200722_tcp_anon.pcapng'. Implement a rule named 'Alert_High_RST' (Filter: 'tcp.flags.reset == 1', Background: Red 255,0,0, Foreground: White 255,255,255) and a rule named 'Alert_Medium_SYN' (Filter: 'tcp.flags.syn == 1 && tcp.flags.ack == 0', Background: Yellow 255,255,0, Foreground: Black 0,0,0). Ensure these rules are enabled and prioritized at the top of the list. Identify the frame number of the first packet highlighted by the 'Alert_High_RST' rule and save only the number to '~/Documents/rst_frame_number.txt'. Export a screenshot of the colored packet list to '~/Documents/colored_packets.png'.
